raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.6":"'Clean this up' applied to a prose artifact unambiguously centers on sentence and paragraph quality — this is the load-bearing responsibility; failure to improve clarity, concision, and flow directly invalidates the delegation","R1.2":"Peripherally relevant only: a prose pass may surface awkward logical transitions (e.g. the repetitive restatement of the central innovation at the end), but re-architecting the argument is not requested","R1.5":"Peripherally relevant only: light structural smoothing (paragraph breaks, transitions) may accompany polish, but section-level reorganization is not in scope"},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' applied to a prose artifact unambiguously centers on sentence and paragraph quality — this is the load-bearing responsibility; failure to improve clarity, concision, and flow directly invalidates the delegation
rationale.R1.2: Peripherally relevant only: a prose pass may surface awkward logical transitions (e.g. the repetitive restatement of the central innovation at the end), but re-architecting the argument is not requested
rationale.R1.5: Peripherally relevant only: light structural smoothing (paragraph breaks, transitions) may accompany polish, but section-level reorganization is not in scope
